{"path":"/Users/horatiubudai/codex/something/index.html","content":" BebeCoin - The Meme Coin

BebeCoin

The cutest memecoin on the block(chain)!

What is BebeCoin?

BebeCoin (BEBE) is a new meme cryptocurrency that's simple, adorable, and all about fun. It's black, it's white, it's bold — just like our community.

Why BebeCoin?

  • Community-driven and fun-focused
  • Zero utility, maximum vibes
  • No rug pulls, just cuddles

Join the Movement!

Hop into our Telegram or follow us on Twitter. Let's go BEBE!

© 2026 BebeCoin

"}

{
  "type": "create",
  "filePath": "/Users/horatiubudai/codex/something/style.css",
  "content": "body {\n  background: #111;\n  color: #fff;\n  font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif;\n  margin: 0;\n  min-height: 100vh;\n  display: flex;\n  flex-direction: column;\n}\n\nheader {\n  padding: 2rem 0 1rem 0;\n  text-align: center;\n  background: #000;\n  border-bottom: 3px solid #fff;\n}\n\nheader h1 {\n  font-size: 3rem;\n  margin: 0;\n  letter-spacing: 2px;\n  color: #fff;\n}\n\n.subtitle {\n  font-size: 1.3rem;\n  color: #fff;\n  font-style: italic;\n  margin-top: 0.5rem;\n}\n\nmain {\n  flex: 1;\n  max-width: 600px;\n  margin: 2rem auto;\n  padding: 0 1rem;\n}\n\nsection {\n  margin-bottom: 2rem;\n  background: #222;\n  padding: 1.2rem 1.6rem;\n  border-radius: 16px;\n  border: 1px solid #fff;\n}\n\nh2 {\n  color: #fff;\n  letter-spacing: 1px;\n}\nul {\n  padding-left: 1.5em;\n}\nul li {\n  margin-bottom: 0.5em;\n  color: #fff;\n}\na {\n  color: #fff;\n  text-decoration: underline;\n  font-weight: bold;\n}\na:hover {\n  color: #111;\n  background: #fff;\n  padding: 2px 6px;\n  border-radius: 3px;\n  transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;\n}\nfooter {\n  text-align: center;\n  padding: 1rem 0 1.5rem 0;\n  background: #111;\n  color: #fff;\n  border-top: 1px solid #fff;\n  font-size: 0.9rem;\n}\n",
  "structuredPatch": [
    {
      "oldStart": 1,
      "oldLines": 0,
      "newStart": 1,
      "newLines": 77,

        "+body {",

        "+",
